title: elsholtzia densa var. calycocarpa
intro: Elsholtzia densa var. calycocarpa, also known as Thai basil or Thai balm, is a plant species in the mint family, characterized by its aromatic leaves and purple flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Elsholtzia densa var. calycocarpa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions or as a natural remedy for stress relief.
